heading: Compliance roadmap note
roadmapNote: A&A Driving School provides driving course guidance and bilingual support. Some regulated courses may be offered through approved providers, and eligibility may vary. We are not the Florida DMV/FLHSMV and do not guarantee specific outcomes.

statements.partner-provided: This regulated course is delivered through an approved course provider. We are not the provider and do not issue course completion ourselves.
statements.educational-guide: This is an educational preparation product — not an official state course or exam.
statements.not-official-dmv: We are not the Florida DMV/FLHSMV, a court, or a testing site, and we do not claim state approval.
statements.no-guarantee: We do not guarantee exam results, ticket dismissal, point removal, license reinstatement, or insurance discounts. Those outcomes are decided by the state, courts, or your insurer.

globalFooter: A&A Driving School provides driving course guidance and bilingual support. Some regulated courses may be offered through approved providers, and eligibility may vary. We are not the Florida DMV/FLHSMV and do not guarantee specific outcomes. Always confirm current requirements with official state sources.
globalFooterShort: A&A Driving School provides course guidance and bilingual support. Some regulated courses may be offered through approved providers; eligibility may vary. We are not the Florida DMV/FLHSMV and do not guarantee specific outcomes.
